title: HjälpProgrammet - Digital Mental Health Support
problem: Access to mental health support is limited. Many people cannot afford or access traditional therapy.
solution: Digital self-help program for mental health, offering guided exercises, CBT-based tools, and progress tracking.
technology: Mobile app, CBT modules, progress tracking
varden_fit: Moderate — mental health support could complement Varden's mental health provider network.
notes: Digital mental health self-help. Lower-intensity intervention.
